overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a female character exploring a dense, foggy forest at night. The character walks along a trail beside a lake, uses a flashlight to navigate the darkness, and discovers items including a cooler and a trail marker post.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail between fence and rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow forest path with flashlight off, moving between a wooden fence and rock wall

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running along the left side of the trail
moss-covered rock wall bordering the right side of the path
tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a wooden fence on the left and a mossy rock wall on the right, moving through a dense foggy forest with minimal ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path illuminated by flashlight

events.description: character activates flashlight, casting a bright beam that illuminates the fog and path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through dense forest using flashlight to light the way, scanning the surroundings for threats or items

entered.detail: thick undergrowth and tree trunks filling the path ahead
massive tree trunks flanking both sides of the narrow trail
ferns and bushes lining the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character activates a flashlight and continues deeper into the dense forest, the beam cutting through the fog to reveal large tree trunks and thick undergrowth along the narrow trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside forest path with wooden fence

events.description: path opens to reveal foggy lake water visible through the trees on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeside path with flashlight active, observing the water through the fog

entered.detail: calm lake surface visible through the fog beyond the fence
decaying logs lying near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a foggy lake on the right, with the wooden fence now running along the water's edge. The character continues walking along the lakeside trail with the flashlight illuminating the path.

events.description: character turns left away from the lake and approaches a white object on the ground
character examines a white cooler box and thermos placed on the ground

agents.ego_description: turning toward and examining a white cooler box and thermos placed near a stone wall, shining flashlight on the items

entered.detail: low stone wall partially covered in moss and vegetation
white rectangular cooler sitting on the ground among leaves
silver thermos bottle placed next to the cooler

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the lake and approaches a white cooler box and metal thermos sitting on the ground near a mossy stone wall, examining the items with the flashlight beam.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with trail marker post

events.description: character approaches a stone post with colorful markers and aims weapon at it

agents.ego_description: approaching a stone marker post with red, yellow, and green markers on top, aiming at the markers while illuminating them

entered.detail: weathered stone pillar standing upright in the forest
red, yellow, and green painted markers attached to the top of the stone post

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward a stone post topped with colorful trail markers, aiming at the markers while the flashlight illuminates the stone structure in the dark forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy forest that gradually opens up to a lakeside path before narrowing again toward abandoned objects. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt trail hemmed in by a wooden fence and a mossy rock wall under dim, ambient light. As the character activates a flashlight, the beam cuts through the thickening fog to reveal towering tree trunks and dense undergrowth, before the environment expands to reveal a misty lake running alongside the fence. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the water's edge, using the flashlight to illuminate a white cooler box and metal thermos resting against a stone wall. Finally, the camera moves toward a stone post topped with colorful trail markers, focusing on the structure as it stands isolated in the dark woods.
